headline: A Look At D.R. Horton (DHI) Valuation After Weaker Fiscal 2026 Earnings
summary: D.R. Horton (DHI) is back in the spotlight after reporting second quarter and first half fiscal 2026 results that showed lower sales and earnings versus a year earlier, raising fresh questions about its earnings power. See our latest analysis for D.R. Horton. The stock has been choppy around the latest results, with a 1-day share price return of -2.52% and a 7-day share price return of -5.87%. The 1-year total shareholder return of 20.37% points to longer term momentum that has not fully...
